entries.objective: To decide how to organize the five page WCET paper and which sections and subsections to include
entries.prompt: I asked the AI to suggest a suitable structure for a five page IEEE conference paper about WCET analysis methods for real time systems.
entries.ai_output_summary: The AI suggested sections for the introduction, WCET foundations, static analysis, measurement based analysis, hybrid analysis, method comparison and conclusion.

actions: I checked whether the suggested structure matched the assigned WCET topic from different references about this topic and the reference paper

issues: The first structure was too detailed and when I asked for a more basic one it was too basic. No balance

entries.reflection: It helped me to create a clear structure and it was a good starting point for the paper
